name: Vincit Oyj
summary: Vincit Oyj provides software development services. It offers electronic services and information systems; browser-based HTML5 services and mobile applications for smartphone platforms; develops measurement and medical equipment software; and provides service design. The company was formerly known as Vincit Group Oyj and changed its name to Vincit Oyj in May 2018. Vincit Oyj is based in Tampere, Finland.
